data.title: American Battery Completes Feasibility Study for Lithium Project
data.description:
American Battery Technology ( (ABAT) ) has issued an announcement.

On October 16, 2025, American Battery Technology Company announced the completion of the S-K 1300 Technical Report and Preliminary Feasibility Study for its Tonopah Flats Lithium Project, highlighting its significant economic potential and strategic importance to the U.S. lithium supply chain. The study revealed a 21.8% internal rate of return and a net present value of $2.57 billion, with a 45-year life-of-mine plan. The project has been selected for streamlined permitting by the Trump Administration, and initial approval for $900 million in low-cost financing has been granted, underscoring its potential impact on the domestic critical mineral manufacturing supply chain.

The most recent analyst rating on (ABAT) stock is a Buy with a $6.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on American Battery Technology stock, see the ABAT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ABAT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ABAT is a Neutral.

American Battery Technology’s overall stock score is primarily affected by its poor financial performance, characterized by significant losses and cash flow issues. While technical analysis shows some positive momentum, the negative valuation metrics further weigh down the overall score.

To see Spark’s full report on ABAT stock, click here.

More about American Battery Technology

American Battery Technology Company is an integrated critical battery materials company focusing on the commercialization of primary battery mineral manufacturing and lithium-ion battery recycling facilities.

data.title: SL Green Realty Reports Q3 2025 Financial Gains
data.description:
SL Green Realty ( (SLG) ) has provided an announcement.

In the third quarter of 2025, SL Green Realty Corp. reported a net income of $0.34 per share, a significant improvement from a net loss of $0.21 per share in the same period of 2024. The company also achieved funds from operations (FFO) of $1.58 per share, up from $1.13 per share in 2024, despite incurring transaction costs related to a gaming license pursuit. SL Green signed 52 Manhattan office leases totaling 657,942 square feet in the third quarter, with a slight decrease in mark-to-market rent values. The company also entered into significant investment activities, including a contract to purchase Park Avenue Tower for $730 million and the sale of a 5% interest in One Vanderbilt Avenue, generating $86.6 million in proceeds. Additionally, SL Green completed a $1.4 billion refinancing of 11 Madison Avenue and recorded a net gain of $57.2 million from debt extinguishment at 1552-1560 Broadway.

The most recent analyst rating on (SLG) stock is a Buy with a $72.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SL Green Realty stock, see the SLG Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Worksport Announces Record Q3 2025 Revenue Growth
data.description:
An announcement from Worksport ( (WKSP) ) is now available.

On October 16, 2025, Worksport Ltd. announced record revenue growth and margin expansion for Q3 2025, with revenue reaching $5.015 million, marking a 62% increase year-over-year. The company achieved a gross margin of 31%, up from 7.9% in Q3 2024, and produced 8,600 units, doubling production since Q1 2025. These results highlight Worksport’s operational leverage and manufacturing efficiency ahead of launching new clean-energy products, SOLIS, COR, and Aetherlux by Terravis, which are expected to further strengthen its market position.

data.title: OSR Holdings Acquires Woori IO for Strategic Expansion
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from OSR Holdings ( (OSRH) ).

On October 13, 2025, OSR Holdings Co., Ltd. (OSRK), a subsidiary of OSR Holdings Inc., entered into an agreement to acquire Woori IO Co., Ltd. (WORIO), a South Korean medical-device company specializing in non-invasive glucose monitoring technology. This acquisition, valued at approximately KRW 15 billion (USD 10.6 million), will make WORIO a wholly owned subsidiary of OSRK, with the transaction expected to close on January 12, 2026. WORIO’s innovative near-infrared spectroscopy platform for needle-free glucose monitoring aligns with OSRH’s strategy to enhance its medical-device platform and capture a share of the global glucose-monitoring market, projected to be worth over $40 billion by 2030. The acquisition is expected to strengthen OSRH’s industry positioning by integrating WORIO’s technology and leveraging its partnership with a major consumer electronics company for clinical development.

More about OSR Holdings

OSR Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: OSRH) is a global healthcare holding company focused on advancing biomedical innovation in health and wellness. Through its subsidiaries, the company engages in immuno-oncology, regenerative biologics, and medical device technologies, aiming to build a portfolio of breakthrough healthcare solutions to improve global health outcomes.

This platform, part of the ARAX Blockchain-as-a-Platform Ecosystem, aims to facilitate secure and efficient tokenization processes, impacting sectors like trade, supply chain finance, and real estate. The platform is currently in pre-release staging, with general availability expected soon, and is integrated with Shopify and DevNet.

More about Arax Holdings

Arax Holdings Corp. is a pioneer in decentralized infrastructure and blockchain-based enterprise solutions, focusing on tokenization systems for real-world assets. The company operates within the blockchain industry, offering enterprise-grade solutions that integrate compliance and identity verification.

data.title: Western Alliance Files Lawsuit Against Cantor Group
data.description:
An update from Western Alliance ( (WAL) ) is now available.

In August, Western Alliance Bank initiated a lawsuit against Cantor Group V, LLC, alleging fraud related to a revolving credit facility secured by commercial real estate loans. Despite these allegations, the bank believes the existing collateral is adequate to cover the obligations. The company maintains its financial outlook for 2025, noting that its criticized assets have decreased since June 30, 2025.

The most recent analyst rating on (WAL) stock is a Buy with a $118.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Western Alliance stock, see the WAL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WAL Stock

Western Alliance’s overall stock score is driven by strong financial performance and a positive earnings call, which highlight robust growth and profitability. However, technical analysis indicates bearish momentum, and cash flow challenges weigh on the score. The valuation remains attractive, providing a balanced outlook.

Western Alliance Bancorporation operates in the financial services industry, primarily offering banking services through Western Alliance Bank. The company focuses on providing credit facilities and other banking services, with a market focus on commercial real estate loans.
